jobs.description: Collect Seerist signals every 6 hours for all regions
Compute signal deltas 15 min after seerist collection
Evaluate flash thresholds and dispatch triggered alerts
Generate and deliver weekly INTSUM every Monday 05:00 UTC

jobs.command: uv run python tools/source_harvester.py && uv run python tools/source_discoverer.py && uv run python tools/benchmark_extractor.py && uv run python tools/crq_comparator.py
jobs.description: Weekly CRQ validation: harvest known sources, discover new ones, extract benchmarks, compare vs VaCR — every Sunday 02:00 UTC
